flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Michigan State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.8k → $16.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Michigan State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Michigan State University are 24% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($67.3k vs $54.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Michigan State University rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (43.7% → 48.9%).
